summary: Mobile responsiveness testing on Android (360x800) and iPhone (390x844) viewports. CRITICAL ISSUE: Stats grid renders as single column instead of 2x2 due to CSS override in index.css. Sovereign badge is partially off-screen. Scroll functionality works correctly. Hero CTA buttons stack properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Stats grid (94%, 15+, 500+, 24/7) renders as SINGLE COLUMN instead of 2x2 on mobile. CSS rule in /app/frontend/src/index.css lines 805-812 forces ALL .grid-cols-2 classes to 'grid-template-columns: 1fr !important' on max-width: 639px
ui_bugs.evidence: gridTemplateColumns computed as '288px' (single column) instead of 'repeat(2, 1fr)'. All 4 items stacked vertically at same X position

ui_bugs.issue: Badge position x=-12 (off-screen to left), width=360px spanning full viewport instead of small badge at bottom-right. Should be positioned at bottom-3 right-3 on mobile
ui_bugs.evidence: getBoundingClientRect shows x=-12, width=360px. CSS has bottom:12px, right:12px but it's not working correctly

issues: Nav height is 93px - taller than typical mobile nav
Get Started button is 87x67px - acceptable but could be smaller

stats_grid.root_cause: CSS rule in index.css:805-812 forces .grid-cols-2 to 1fr on mobile

stats_grid_issue.impact: Forces ALL grids with grid-cols-2 class to single column on mobile, including stats grid which should be 2x2
stats_grid_issue.additional_file: /app/frontend/src/mobile-ux-overhaul.css lines 296-301 also has similar rule for 'main .grid[class*="grid-cols-2"]'

badge_issue.analysis: Badge has CSS classes 'fixed bottom-3 right-3 sm:bottom-5 sm:right-5' but computed position shows x=-12, suggesting either CSS override or parent container issue causing incorrect positioning

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix stats grid 2x2 layout by modifying CSS rule in /app/frontend/src/index.css lines 805-812 - exclude .grid-cols-2.md\:grid-cols-4 from the 1fr override OR add specific exception for stats grid
Fix sovereign badge positioning - investigate why x=-12 and width=360px instead of proper bottom-right placement
Consider reducing nav height from 93px to ~60-70px for mobile
critical_code_review_comments: index.css line 805-812: CSS rule forces ALL grid-cols-2 to single column on mobile (max-width: 639px) - this breaks the stats 2x2 requirement
mobile-ux-overhaul.css lines 296-301: Additional rule 'main .grid[class*="grid-cols-2"]' also forces single column
Main agent's fix in landing-mobile-ux.css for 'section .grid { display: block !important }' was removed, but index.css still has the problematic rule

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Stats grid and badge issues found

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stats grid 2x2 issue is caused by CSS rule in index.css:805-812 forcing .grid-cols-2 to 1fr. Sovereign badge has positioning bug. Scroll works correctly. All other mobile layouts (feature cards, outcome cards, pricing cards) render as expected single column.

rca_of_the_issue.original_problem: Stats grid showing single column instead of 2x2 on mobile
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: CSS rule in /app/frontend/src/index.css lines 805-812 has '@media (max-width: 639px) { .grid-cols-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }' which overrides Tailwind's grid-cols-2 class and forces single column layout
rca_of_the_issue.fix_required: Either: 1) Remove/modify the CSS rule in index.css to not affect stats grid, OR 2) Add higher-specificity CSS rule for stats section to preserve 2x2 grid, OR 3) Use inline styles on stats grid
rca_of_the_issue.verified_working: Hero CTA stacking, feature cards single column, outcome cards, pricing cards, scroll functionality
